//: Staged for the future standalone repo (see ../SPLIT-PLAN.md). Not consumed yet — today the monorepo root package.json + relative imports are authoritative. PANTRY is the app: nothing imports it, so it has no `exports`, only `files` so `bunx pantry` from a git-dep ships its bundled assets.
name: @tjakoen/pantry
description: PANTRY — the installable developer-docs + AI cockpit: composes BATCH+GRAIN+MILL+PROOF into one server you bunx into any project.
author: Tjakoen Stolk <tjakoen.s@gmail.com> (https://tjakoen.github.io)
